notes: NEW BEHAVIOR: Bistable policy — 3/5 hover (29.98s) and 2/5 crash (~0.9s) from the SAME model. First time both modes appear in benchmark. Short episodes (300 steps) made the deterministic mean policy edge-unstable — it's right at the phase transition boundary. Still 0 gates in all runs. Training was bimodal throughout (20.50 ± 6.45, range 6-26). The curriculum approach shifted the policy to the edge but didn't break through to navigation. The hover runs still show 0 gates despite 29.98s flight — the policy hovers in place when it doesn't crash.
